data.title: Rivian Delivers Vehicles To HelloFresh In First Non-Amazon Deal After Ending Its Exclusive Partnership
data.description: Rivian partners with HelloFresh to add 70 electric vans to fleet after ending Amazon deal, helping save HelloFresh 200 tonnes of CO2.

data.title: Scientists Detect Possible Signs Of Life On Distant Planet K2-18b
data.description: New research from Cambridge University reveals potential signs of life on a distant planet. However, proposed budget cuts could impact space programs that make these discoveries possible.

data.title: CBP's Latest Tariff Figures Reveal $500 Million In Collections, Dwarfing Trump's $2 Billion Daily Estimate
data.description: CBP reports $500M in tariff revenue, far below Trump's claim of $2B per day. Discrepancy raises questions about benefits of tariff policies.

data.title: Too Expensive To Buy One Bitcoin? Earn It By Winning This Quantum Computing Challenge
data.description: Quantum computing research firm Project Eleven launched a bounty program on Wednesday to assess the threat of quantum computing to Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) security. The reward—one full unit of the apex cryptocurrency.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Higher Ahead Of Festive Weekend: 'Current Equity Levels Offer An Attractive Entry Opportunity'
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Thursday ahead of the long weekend, with Good Friday falling on April 18 and Easter Sunday on April 20.
